revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:泉神社]]
'''Izumi Shrine''' (泉神社) refers to several {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} across Japan.
* {{ill|Izumi Shrine (Hitachi)|ja|泉神社 (日立市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumi Shrine (Hitachi)|1=Izumi Shrine (Hitachi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11554897}} (Hitachi City, Ibaraki Prefecture) - A {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} small shrine. The {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} categorized it as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Izumi Shrine (Maibara)|ja|泉神社 (米原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumi Shrine (Maibara)|qq=}} (Maibara City, Shiga Prefecture) * {{ill|Izumi Shrine (Usa)|ja|泉神社 (宇佐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumi Shrine (Usa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579316|1=Izumi Shrine (Usa)}} (Usa City, Oita Prefecture) - Formerly classified as a Gōsha.
==Other spellings== * {{ill|Izumi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|和泉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumi Shrine (Nagahama)|1=Izumi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132125270}} (和泉神社)
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|泉神社|version=54730329|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:泉神社]]
